Name: CHR_POINT_WIND_PARAM
Description: Defines a localized point-based wind effect, controlling strength, range, and temporal behavior for environmental or character-influenced wind simulation.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: Determines the evaluation priority when multiple wind sources overlap.

Fields.Name: Effect Radius
Fields.Description: Radius of influence for the wind effect in meters. In metres.

Fields.Name: Minimum Wind Speed
Fields.Description: Lowest wind strength applied within the effect area. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Maximum Wind Speed
Fields.Description: Highest wind strength applied within the effect area. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Wind Oscillation Frequency
Fields.Description: Controls how rapidly the wind strength fluctuates over time.

Fields.Name: Attenuation Start Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which wind intensity begins to fade out from its full strength.

Fields.Name: Fade-In Time
Fields.Description: Time it takes for the wind effect to reach full strength. In seconds.
